compiled_state.title: RED test: Update test_review_workflow_model_escalation.py for ratchet behavior
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Modify tests/skills/test_review_workflow_model_escalation.py to assert ratchet behavior:
1. Update test_re_review_escalation_specifies_standard_to_opus — change from asserting pass 3+ language to asserting RATCHETED_TIER-based escalation
2. Add test_ratchet_variable_initialized — assert the bash block initializes RATCHETED_TIER
3. Add test_pass3_plus_removed — assert the bash block does NOT contain the pass 3+ auto-escalation (REVIEW_PASS_NUM >= 3 → full deep)
4. Add test_pass2_preserved — assert pass 2 behavior (light→standard, deep→full pipeline) is preserved unchanged
5. Keep test_deep_tier_re_review_always_uses_full_pipeline passing (pass 2 deep behavior preserved)

Test approach: Parse REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md bash code block, assert ratchet patterns present and pass 3+ patterns absent.

Tests FAIL RED because REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md still has pass 3+ logic and no RATCHETED_TIER.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test_review_workflow_model_escalation.py (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file contains ratchet assertions
  Verify: grep -c 'RATCHETED_TIER\|ratchet' tests/skills/test_review_workflow_model_escalation.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] New tests fail RED against current REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_review_workflow_model_escalation.py --tb=short -q 2>&1 | grep -q FAILED
